name: Number C6: Chronomaly Chaos Atlandis
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>６ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>先史遺産</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オーパーツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カオス・アトランタル
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Roku Ōpātsu Kaosu Atorantaru
name_jp_rom_base: Kaosu Nanbāzu Roku Senshi Isan Kaosu Atorantaru
name_jp_tl_base: Chaos Numbers 6: Prehistoric Heritage Chaos Atlantal
desc:
3 Level 7 monsters
If you activate any of this card's effects, your opponent takes no further damage this turn. Once per turn: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; equip that target to this card as an Equip Spell Card whose effect makes this monster gain 1000 ATK. If this card has "Number 6: Chronomaly Atlandis" as an Xyz Material, it gains this effect.
● You can detach 3 Xyz Materials from this card and send all "Number" monsters equipped by this card's effect to the Graveyard (min. 1); make your opponent's Life Points 100.

action: Equips monsters from the opponent's field to itself
Grants effect to Equip Spell Card
Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
mst: Gains effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
